title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building multi-agent systems to automate enterprise migrations from Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). The approach uses sequential and loop-based agent orchestration with context caching, self-correcting loops, and Google Search grounding to generate detailed assessment reports.
